verdict: PASS. Re-check after deep-band length-fail revision. Corpus expanded to ~5320 words, within the corpus-critic deep band (5000-6000). All four checks pass: required sections present and non-trivial; strict web_search citation density met (primary [1] cited repeatedly, [2]/[3] cited, no fabricated markers, key-claim ratio >=0.60); no sequence drift (no forbidden future-1.4 material); length within band.

required_sections.detail: Sections 3 (Learning Objectives), 4 (Introduction), 5 (Core Concepts), 10 (Key Takeaways) all present and non-trivial. Section 5 well exceeds 100 words; sections 3, 4, 10 each exceed 50 words. No placeholder strings in required sections.

citation_density.detail: Primary resource [1] (realpython operators) cited many times across Core Concepts, Implementation, and Real-World Patterns. Supporting [2] (docs.python.org expressions) and [3] (geeksforgeeks operators) both cited multiple times. Every primary resource cited >=1x. Standalone factual assertions in sections 5/6/7 carry [N] markers well above the 60% threshold.

sequence_drift.detail: All technical content maps to 1.3 concepts_introduced (arithmetic incl / vs // % **, precedence + parentheses, comparison ops, logical and/or/not, short-circuit, booleans & truthiness) or prior 1.1 (Colab cell, run, print()) and 1.2 (variables, =, snake_case, int/float/str/bool, type(), case sensitivity, dynamic typing). No forbidden future-1.4 material: no type conversion via int()/float()/str()/bool(), no f-strings, no string indexing/slicing/concatenation-as-lesson, no type hints, no match-case, no chained/tuple assignment, no teaching of if/while syntax. Strings appear only as ==/!= comparison operands and truthiness examples (in scope). Truthiness, comparison, logical operators, and short-circuit are in-scope for 1.3 and not flagged.

config_conflict.note: artifact-mix.json (and topic.manifest.json reading.target_word_range) specify deep = 1800-2200 words (seat-time band). corpus-critic SKILL.md specifies deep = 5000-6000 words. Per prior adjudication, the band the corpus-critic skill itself specifies was applied: 5000-6000.

length_sanity.detail: 5320 words falls within the deep band (5000-6000). PASS. This clears the prior length-fail (2340 words) that triggered the revision.
